ogTitle: Durham Ox vs Dutson Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Durham Ox and Dutson Downs.
heading: Durham Ox vs Dutson Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Durham Ox, Victoria and Dutson Downs, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dutson Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Durham Ox (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Durham Ox or Dutson Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Durham Ox has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Dutson Downs scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Durham Ox scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Dutson Downs scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Durham Ox or Dutson Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dutson Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
